description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-ubuntu-24.04-sanitizers that runs on a schedule, on push to main, and on pull requests to main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs on non-main branches. It should trigger a job on Ubuntu 24.04 that checks out the repository with submodules, uses ccache, builds with Clang and sanitizers enabled, and runs tests with ctest.
